archive_summary.title: All Metrics
archive_summary.description: Complete metric definitions with full descriptions, units, and associated datasets.

section.title: All Metrics (Full Detail)
section.content:
Metrics: 4
## Direction Selectivity Index Key: direction_selectivity_index Unit: ratio Value type: float Version: 1
Classic DSI = (R_pref - R_null) / (R_pref + R_null), where R_pref and R_null are AP rates in the preferred and null directions. Scalar summary of directional tuning strength, reported per simulation condition.
## Tuning Curve Half-Width at Half-Max (degrees) Key: tuning_curve_hwhm_deg Unit: none Value type: float Version: 1
Angular half-width in degrees at which the AP rate drops to half of the peak rate. Measures the sharpness of the directional tuning curve; lower values indicate steeper, more selective tuning.
## Tuning Curve Reliability Key: tuning_curve_reliability Unit: ratio Value type: float Version: 1
Pearson correlation coefficient of the angle-to-AP-rate tuning curve across repeated noisy trials. Measures robustness of directional tuning to stochastic synaptic or membrane noise; 1.0 means perfectly reproducible across trials, 0 means noise-dominated.
## Tuning Curve RMSE (Hz) Key: tuning_curve_rmse Unit: none Value type: float Version: 1
Root-mean-square error in Hz between the simulated angle-to-AP-rate tuning curve and the target tuning curve. Primary optimisation objective; captures absolute rates, preferred angle, and curve shape in one scalar.
